title: Three-Dimentional Item Model
description: Makes 2D items into 3D! Hand made models, free-lag, bad textures! Pls read desc!
body:
##### slow progress due to laziness, work and procrastination. will try to push out more update as possible. # A pack that makes 2D items into 3D! The models are made to be as good as possible but still keep the look of vanilla Minecraft! And importantly, **WORKS WITHOUT ADDITIONAL MOD REQUIRED**, except for emmissive textures which require [Optifine](https://optifine.net). \* This pack is not available to be used with other packs. They might need to adapt with this pack instead since most models need a custom mapped texture file, or just have this pack higher to override other textures and models. \* The pack should work for game versions from 1.14 to latest unless there is any major change in pack formating.   ### Current models in the latest beta version:
Spoiler armor stand
armors
└ horse

News about the pack will be posted on my [BlueSky profile](https://minhtran4325.bsky.social). Feedbacks on there are also appreciated!
